name: sidecar-lint
description: PreToolUse(Bash) auto-lint that fires on `git commit` in repos with .claude-plugin/marketplace.json, implemented in hexa-lang (`_sidecar_lint.hexa`, invoked via `hexa run`). Non-blocking — emits additionalContext for: stale-history patterns in staged diff (commons @D g15), hardcoded /Users//home/ absolute paths (commons @D g13 · sidecar @D s3), marketplace.json plugin entry ↔ each plugin.json version drift (commons @D g22), hook .sh missing user-exec bit. Self-excludes its own files + CHANGELOG.md. NO opt-out by design — no env var, no config file, no exception list.
